properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v5 v3 v6 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I'm surrounded by uncertainty And my fear tries to steal control There's one thing that is no mystery Jesus loves me this I know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I'm flooded with anxiety Waves of doubt won't drown my soul There's a peace that rests inside of me Jesus loves me this I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise the One Who walks beside me through Mountain high and valley low My hope is found in this forever Truth Jesus loves me this I know Jesus loves me this I know

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When my sin says I'm unreachable Past the point where grace will go When I feel anything but unloveable Jesus loves me this I know

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: On Christ the Solid Rock I stand All other ground is sinking sand My Saving Grace My only hope My Jesus loves me this I know

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Praise the One Who walks beside me through Mountain high and valley low My hope is found in this forever Truth Jesus loves me this I know Jesus loves me this I know Jesus loves me this I know
